name: golang-github-magiconair-properties-dev
title: golang-github-magiconair-properties-dev
description:
Java properties scanner for Go
“properties” is a Go library for reading and writing properties files.
.
It supports reading from multiple files and Spring style recursive
property expansion of expressions like ${key} to their corresponding
value.  Value expressions can refer to other keys like in ${key} or
to environment variables like in ${USER}.  Filenames can also contain
environment variables like in /home/${USER}/myapp.properties.
.
Comments and the order of keys are preserved. Comments can be modified
and can be written to the output.
.
The properties library supports both ISO-8859-1 and UTF-8 encoded data.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-magiconair-properties-dev because Java properties scanner for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-magiconair-properties-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-magiconair-properties-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-magiconair-properties-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
